Trade Marketing, Operations, Purchasing, Marketing and Product Development</p><p>Key External Relationships: Category Managers, DMM, buyer/replenishment, marketing</p><p><br></p><p><strong>JOB PURPOSE: </strong></p><p><strong>National Account Manager for a number of strategic customers that develops, plans and executes both brand and customer goals in a jointly profitable outcome: </strong></p><ul><li>Owning and hitting/exceeding annual sales targets within assigned territory and accounts.</li><li>Developing and executing strategic plan to achieve sales targets and expand our customer base.</li><li>Building and maintaining strong, long-lasting customer and internal relationships.</li><li>Managing and developing team to deliver on corporate strategic goals and develop talent within team.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>ESSENTIAL FUNCTIONS:</strong></p><ul><li><strong>Exceed sales budget targets </strong>by developing and executing a strategic customer plan that includes: expanding distribution, launching innovation, executing a measured promotional plan and pivoting when appropriate.</li><li><strong>Grow P&amp;L contribution </strong>by growing top line sales, reducing operational costs and maximizing ROI on trade/markdown spend.</li><li><strong>Increase share of brands </strong>by expanding into new markets or customers, replacing competitive brands in existing retailers and creating a beauty statement within each category.</li><li><strong>Create an award-winning team </strong>with direct oversight of brokers and working directly with retailers.</li><li><strong>Maintain accurate weekly S&amp;OP forecasts by customer or region </strong>by reporting on-time sku movement, layering in promotional influence and understanding customer current weeks of supply.</li><li><strong>Develop, maintain and create customer or regional reporting for both internal and external use: </strong>examples are not limited to weekly POS, syndicated dates analytics, NPD performance tracking, holiday sell-through and Adhoc analysis.</li><li><strong>Lead internal planning and execute plans </strong>by creating, evaluating and managing profitable/strategic opportunity briefs and promotional plans.</li><li><strong>Predict the needs of the audience for sales/customer meetings </strong>by understanding the customers needs and requirements, combining internal goals, setting cadence to productive meetings and following up with concise actions.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>QUALIFICATIONS: </strong></p><ul><li>Minimum 3-5 years sales experience of calling on national accounts</li><li>Broker management experience required</li><li>Track record of setting, measuring and achieving goals</li><li>BA/BS required</li><li>Self-motivated and highly driven</li><li>Strong Presentation skills</li><li>Strong computer skills</li></ul> design, marketing, exec New York City Metropolitan Area Executive Assistant Zirtual Zirtual is a work-life balanced company that provides clients with experienced, highly skilled remote assistants for both personal and professional needs. Our Executive Assistants are committed to delivering efficient, proactive, and high-quality support that meets and exceeds client expectations.<br><br>The Executive Assistant is a vital member of the Zirtual team and serves as the primary point of contact for assigned clients. In this role, you will work independently while receiving support from an Account Supervisor, who will assist with client relationships, plan adjustments, quality feedback, and ongoing guidance.<br><br>As an Executive Assistant, you will play a critical role in supporting busy professionals by managing schedules, communications, and day-to-day operations. You will help streamline workflows, anticipate needs, and ensure tasks are completed efficiently and accurately.<br><br>Assistants are expected to be available for clients during business hours as agreed upon with each client but around-the-clock availability is not expected.
